title: Documenting Board Usage
excerpt: Has anyone found a great way or template to document how and what their boards are used for? I am looking to document the way to use boards for team training.

posts.author: EmilyKuzma (Emily Kuzma)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone found a great way or template to document how and what their boards are used for? I am looking to document the way to use boards for team training.
